info.title: Bisakerja Backend API
info.description: OpenAPI reference for the Bisakerja Backend API. This document is the canonical source for the built-in Scalar API reference and covers public, authenticated, and AI-assisted routes shipped by the current runtime registry.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Account registration, login, session, and recovery flows.

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Public normalized job listing search and detail.

tags.name: Internal
tags.description: Service-token protected scraper sync and handoff routes.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Current-user profile and onboarding-related profile data.

tags.name: AI CV Analyzer
tags.description: Authenticated CV analysis against a selected job.

get.description: Confirms the API process can respond to HTTP requests. This route does not verify downstream dependencies.
Confirms the runtime is ready to serve traffic and verifies critical dependencies such as PostgreSQL.

post.description: Creates a user account and starts the email verification flow.

example.message: Account registered successfully. Please verify your email.

post.description: Authenticates with email or username and password, then returns an access token while setting the refresh token cookie.
Issues a new access token using the refresh token cookie.

401.description: Refresh cookie is missing or invalid.

post.description: Invalidates the current session and clears the refresh token cookie.
Sends password reset instructions when the email exists. The response is intentionally generic for security.

example.message: If the email is registered, password reset instructions will be sent.

post.description: Sets a new password when the reset token is valid.

401.description: Reset token is expired or invalid.

post.description: Verifies email ownership using the OTP code sent by email.

401.description: Email verification OTP is expired or invalid.

post.description: Reserved placeholder route for future Google SSO integration. It currently always returns not implemented.
Service-token protected batch upsert endpoint used by Scraper API to publish normalized jobs into backend-owned read models.

401.description: Service token is missing or invalid.

post.description: Service-token protected handoff endpoint used by Scraper API after successful job sync.

401.description: Service token is missing or invalid.

get.description: Searches, filters, sorts, and paginates normalized public job listings.

details.message: salaryMax must be greater than or equal to salaryMin

get.description: Returns normalized job detail for a visible job listing.
Returns the authenticated user's current profile and onboarding-related data.

profile.summary: Early-career backend developer focused on TypeScript APIs.

patch.description: Updates basic current-user account fields such as username, phone number, and display name.

profile.summary: Early-career backend developer focused on TypeScript APIs.

details.message: At least one field must be provided

put.description: Stores profile photo metadata for the authenticated user. The upload transport is managed separately from this route.

profile.summary: Early-career backend developer focused on TypeScript APIs.

put.description: Replaces the authenticated user's skill list.

profile.summary: Early-career backend developer focused on TypeScript APIs.

details.message: Duplicate skill names are not allowed

put.description: Replaces the authenticated user's experience entries.

profile.summary: Early-career backend developer focused on TypeScript APIs.

details.message: endDate must be greater than or equal to startDate

put.description: Replaces the authenticated user's education entries.

profile.summary: Early-career backend developer focused on TypeScript APIs.

details.message: endYear must be greater than or equal to startYear

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's active career preferences.

put.description: Creates or replaces the authenticated user's active career preferences.

details.message: salaryExpectation.max must be greater than or equal to salaryExpectation.min

patch.description: Applies a partial update to the authenticated user's active career preferences.

post.description: Creates a bookmark for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes the authenticated user's bookmark for the given job.

get.description: Returns paginated current-user application tracker records.

data.notes: Applied from Glints after reviewing fit score.

post.description: Creates a current-user application tracker record for a job.

example.notes: Applied from Glints after reviewing fit score.

data.notes: Applied from Glints after reviewing fit score.

patch.description: Updates notes or source metadata for a current-user application record.

example.notes: Recruiter replied and asked for availability.

data.notes: Recruiter replied and asked for availability.

details.message: At least one field must be provided

patch.description: Updates the status of a current-user application record.

409.description: Requested status transition is not allowed.

example.message: Application status transition is not allowed

post.description: Builds backend-owned user and preference context, calls Model API, and returns a job fit analysis for the selected job.

recommendation.summary: You match the core backend requirements, with minor gaps in deployment experience.
nextSteps: Highlight TypeScript API experience in your CV.
Prepare examples of backend project impact.

experienceMatch.reason: Internship experience is aligned with entry-level backend responsibilities.

skillGaps.reason: The job mentions containerized deployment experience.

example.message: Downstream dependency returned an invalid response

post.description: Accepts a multipart PDF upload and compares the CV against a selected job using Model API.

overallImpression.summary: CV sudah relevan untuk role backend entry-level, terutama pada pengalaman TypeScript API.

jobFitAlignment.summary: Skill utama sesuai, tetapi pengalaman deployment masih perlu diperkuat.

issues: Beberapa section belum memakai heading standar.

keywordOptimization.reason: Keyword ini muncul pada requirement dan relevan dengan backend role.

suggestions: Tambahkan metrik jumlah endpoint yang dibuat.
Tambahkan dampak performa atau reliability jika tersedia.

actionableImprovements: Tambahkan ringkasan 2-3 kalimat yang menonjolkan backend API experience.
Tambahkan keyword Docker jika memang pernah digunakan.
Ubah bullet experience agar menyertakan angka atau dampak.

404.description: Job or bookmark is not found.

413.description: Uploaded CV exceeds the configured limit.

example.message: CV file exceeds the maximum allowed size

details.message: A PDF CV file is required for analysis

example.message: Downstream dependency returned an invalid response
